title: Dragon Block

body:
About
----------------
> This mod adds blocks, ui, mobs, biomes, and more!

Mobs
-----------------
>  None so far

Blocks
------------------
> Saiyan Pod
> Battle Ore

GUI
------------------
> Menu UI
> > Adds a UI for the mod
> > Button to open the ui is V


Effects
-------------------
> SSJ/ Super Saiyan


Biomes
-------------------
> Nemek Biome


Dimensions
-------------------
> Namek


Items
--------------------
> All 7 Dragon Balls
> Gun Blaster (SOOON)
> Battle Shards


Armors
--------------------
> Battle Armor Chestplate
> Battle Armor Boots


Keybinds
--------------------
> C = Charge
>  V = Menu
